heading: AI Systems Research
search_strategy: Prefer arXiv papers from past 14 days, new benchmarks, new safety research. AgentsNet, arXiv 2504.19678, BioMedAgent, o3-mini distillation, Nested Learning, Genie 3, Frontier Model Forum, Broadcom-Google-Anthropic $21B, arXiv 2601.10825, CASCADE, GRASP, personal wiki memory cluster are covered — skip unless material new development.

covered.title: ElevenLabs + IBM watsonx partnership
covered.one_line_summary: Voice AI in enterprise watsonx stack.

covered.title: Reasoning Models Generate Societies of Thought (arXiv 2601.10825)
covered.one_line_summary: Reasoning models spawning multi-agent 'societies' of sub-reasoners at inference time.

covered.title: CASCADE multi-agent framework
covered.one_line_summary: Cascaded agent delegation framework for complex reasoning tasks.

covered.title: Personal wiki / external memory cluster for LLM agents
covered.one_line_summary: Persistent personal knowledge graph as external agent memory.

ongoing_narrative: The AI-systems-research thread through mid-April 2026 has developed a compelling fourth wave to complement the three already tracked: (4) emergent meta-cognition architectures — arXiv 2601.10825 ('Reasoning Models Generate Societies of Thought') shows chain-of-thought spawning autonomous sub-agents at inference time, while CASCADE (cascaded delegation), GRASP (graph-based agent memory), and personal-wiki-as-external-memory cluster together as the 'agent remembers and delegates' paradigm. Waves 1–3 remain live: multi-agent pipelines (AgentsNet, BioMedAgent, 2504.19678) maturing to reproducible benchmark; inference-time scaling + distillation (o3-mini, Nested Learning) pushing reasoning without new pretraining; and compute consolidation (Broadcom-Google-Anthropic $21B, Adaline, FMF) shaping the competitive floor. Genie 3 / World Labs keep the world-model branch warm. Next to hunt: safety red-team papers for reasoning models specifically, fresh MLPerf-style benchmarks, any independent outcome studies reporting objective gains from multi-agent setups in real tasks.
